subject: Brayan Garzon-Rayo
summary: 27-year-old Colombian man who fled violence with mother to St. Louis died Apr 8, 2025 after suicide attempt at Phelps County Jail (Rolla, MO). **ICE'S OWN DEATH REPORT ADMITS PROTOCOLS VIOLATED**. Mental health evaluation scheduled 3 times, NEVER conducted (cancelled Apr 4: short-staffed, Apr 5: COVID-positive, never rescheduled). Had TB diagnosis, COVID-positive, severe stomach pain, previous self-harm reported - ALL ignored. Found unresponsive Apr 7 with blanket around neck. Brain dead Apr 8. 14 days in custody, 100 miles from family. ENTIRELY PREVENTABLE.

key_findings.facility: Phelps County Jail, Rolla, Missouri (ICE contract)
critical_failures: Mental health evaluation scheduled 3 times, never conducted
TB + COVID + pain all inadequately treated
key_findings.mental_health_timeline: Apr 4: cancelled (short staff), Apr 5: cancelled (COVID), never rescheduled
key_findings.pattern: Documented protocol violations, preventable suicide, ICE admits failures
key_findings.ice_admission: ICE death report: 'Records later showed ICE had not followed its own medical protocols before Garzón-Rayo attempted to take his own life'
key_findings.public_health_risk: Second TB case in 2025 detention (after Serawit Dejene)
